text_jp:
お久しぶりです先輩。これで全ての時代の
仮面ライダーが揃ったわけですね{END}
text_en:
It has been a while, senior.
Now every era has its Kamen Rider.{END}

text_jp:
仮面ライダー！？
風見…おまえが仮面ライダーだと？{END}
text_en:
Kamen Rider!?
Kazami... you are a Kamen Rider?{END}

text_jp:
細かい話は後回しにしましょう
今やらなきゃいけないことは…{END}
text_en:
We can discuss the details later.
What we have to do now is...{END}

text_jp: 奴らの時空を超えた計画の阻止{END}
text_en: Their plan reaches beyond time and space.{END}
